entries.summary: Phase 7 completed: All 6 tasks verified and aligned. Task 7.1 added shared chunk_size constants, Task 7.2 added shared max_tokens constants, Task 7.3 updated AFOMIS.spec branding, Task 7.4 updated all documentation to use Qwen3-1.7B consistently, Task 7.5 updated deprecated GitHub Actions, Task 7.6 updated version numbers to 1.1.0.
